utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format lists 7 required items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items with full details. Each item is specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (June 15–19, 2024), transportation (flight details with cost and class), accommodation (hotel with cost and amenities), activities (golf and walking tours with costs), additional_services (restaurant reservation and email to bank with costs), and total_budget (total cost breakdown with comparison to budget). Therefore, all 7 items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which has a rating of 6 in the ground truth. The accommodation is 'Cityscape Hotel', which has a rating of 8. The 'International banking services email sent to Banco do Brasil' is not part of the rated categories and can be ignored for mapping.
